pollRate.title: Poll Rate
pollRate.description: How often (in seconds) to sync devices from the Whisker API. Defaults to 300 (5 minutes).

showNightLight.title: Night Light
showNightLight.description: Controls the night light in HomeKit. 'true' exposes it and sets On mode, 'auto' exposes it and sets Auto mode, 'false' hides it. Defaults to true.

showWasteDrawer.title: Show Waste Drawer
showWasteDrawer.description: Expose the waste drawer as a Filter Maintenance accessory in HomeKit. Defaults to true.
